content_fingerprint: runway launches seedance 2 0 expanding its multimodal ai video platform runway has released seedance 2 0 a video generation and editing model accepting text image video or audio as inputs now available to unlimited and enterprise customers outside the us runway on april 7 2026 made seedance 2 0 broadly available to its unlimited and enterprise plan holders outside the united states the model allows users to generate or edit video from any combination of text prompts images existing video or audio inputs a multimodal workflow that consolidates what previously required separate tools or pipeline
